ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey's purpose */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., Draft, Active, Closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the survey is currently active */,
  "privacy_policy" TEXT /* Privacy policy associated with the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "response_type" INTEGER /* ID of the response type expected */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question within the survey */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the question's creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_response_type FOREIGN KEY ("response_type") REFERENCES response_types ("response_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being responded to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response" TEXT /* The respondent's answer to the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response's submission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the respondent's record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the respondent's record */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the respondent has given consent to use their data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_types" (
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the response type (e.g., Agreement Scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response type */,
  "options" TEXT /* Predefined options for multiple-choice questions (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_type_id")
)
